text: Hey team, we need to decide on the tech stack for the new microservice.
I think we should consider Go or Rust for performance.
Python with FastAPI would be faster to develop. We have the deadline in 3 weeks.
I agree with Charlie. We need to move fast. Let's go with Python and FastAPI.
Good point about the deadline. What about the database?
PostgreSQL is the obvious choice. We already have infrastructure for it.
Agreed on PostgreSQL. I will set up the database schema this week.
For the message queue, should we use RabbitMQ or Redis?
Redis Streams would be simpler. Less infrastructure to manage.
Let's go with Redis Streams then. Simpler is better for our timeline.
Sounds good. I'll handle the CI/CD pipeline setup.
I can do the API scaffolding with FastAPI. Should have a skeleton by Friday.
I will take care of the Docker configuration and deployment scripts.
What about testing? We need at least 80% coverage.
Good call. We decided to use pytest with coverage enforcement in CI.
I'll add the coverage check to the pipeline. 80% minimum.
Should we also set up integration tests?
Yes, let's include integration tests. Eve, can you handle those?
Sure, I'll write the integration tests after the schema is ready.
Great. So to summarize: Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis Streams. Let's reconvene Friday to check progress.
